prompt: A user just said: 'CAP定理和分布式共识之间有什么关系？' The knowledge base is at /tmp/knowledge-test/ with a large domain TestLarge (250+ pages, 350 vectors already embedded). Follow the query skill to answer. Save step-by-step log to transcript.md and final answer to answer.md.
assertions: The agent detected large scale (by reading long index.md or checking page count)
The agent ran qmd update before searching
The agent attempted BM25 search first (qmd search)
The agent used qmd query (hybrid search with LLM reranking) when BM25 results were insufficient
The answer contains [[citations]] referencing actual wiki page names
The agent did NOT run qmd embed (vectors are already ready)
